---
title: "Logging"
sidebar: modules
---

## Overview

::: {.panel-tabset}

{{< include ../../src/Logging/README.md >}}

### 🇪🇸 Español

:::

---

::: {.panel-tabset}

### 🇬🇧 English

{{< include ../../src/Logging.Abstractions/README.md >}}

### 🇪🇸 Español

:::

---

::: {.panel-tabset}
